visa_types.overview:
Overview
The following information applies to those who  intend to travel to Norway for business, conference and/or sport purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The following information applies to those who  intend to travel to Norway for business, conference and/or sport purposes.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business/Conference/Sports]

## Please Note :
- Payment for Visa Fees are done on-line only at
https://www.udi.no/en (https://www.udi.no/en)
- All fees are  non-refundable.
- There is a Service fee of EUR26 (MYR130) levied per application over and above the visa fee.
Courier re-submission:
The applicant may request to have the passport returned from the embassy while the application is being processed. If the applicant later resubmits the passport for issuance of visa, VFS may request the applicant to pay EUR 23.40 (MYR 115) to cover the Resubmission Courier.
The Visa Application Centre offers the following additional services at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table:Visit Family,Boyfriend/Girlfriend Or Friend]
All charges except Visa Fees are to be paid at Visa Application Center by cash/card in Malaysian Ringgit (VFS service charge and other charges)

## Documents Required
Please click  here  (https://www.norway.no/en/thailand/services-info/visitors-visa-res-permit/visitors-visa/#necessary-doc)for detail information 

## Photo Specifications
Please click here for Photo Specifications.

## Processing Time
Please click  here  (https://www.udi.no/en/word-definitions/waitingtime/)for detail information 

## Download Forms
Please check the boxes in the check-list and sign to confirm which documents you have submitted
Application Form - The applicant can register the visa application online on the Application Portal.
Please click here (https://selfservice.udi.no/)
Sponsorship Form for Visits – Must be filled out by the sponsor please click here

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: 7-Day Entry Visa – Spouse
visa_types.forms:
Please check the boxes in the check-list and sign to confirm which documents you have submitted
Application Form - The applicant can register the visa application online on the Application Portal.
Please click here (https://selfservice.udi.no/)
Sponsorship Form for Visits – Must be filled out by the sponsor please click here
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreign spouses of Norwegian citizens are, as a  general rule, required to submit their applications for a residence permit at  the Norwegian Embassy, and are not permitted to enter Norway until a residence  permit has been granted by the Norwegian Directorate of Immigration (UDI).  However, in some exceptional cases, the Embassy may grant a 7-day Entry Visa (a  national D-visa) so that the foreign spouse can travel to Norway to submit the  application for Residence Permit, and wait in Norway while the case is being  processed. Similarly, a 7-day Entry Visa may be granted if an application for  Residence Permit already has been submitted. The Embassy processes the case,  but a rejection may be appealed to UDI Applications for 7-day entry visas  (D-visas) are to be registered on the Application Portal. Simply fill out the  same application form as for a Schengen Visa, pay the handling fee of 60 Euros  using a credit/ debit card, and book an appointment for when you would like to  submit your passport and supporting documents at the Norwegian Visa Application  Centre.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreign spouses of Norwegian citizens are, as a  general rule, required to submit their applications for a residence permit at  the Norwegian Embassy, and are not permitted to enter Norway until a residence  permit has been granted by the Norwegian Directorate of Immigration (UDI).  However, in some exceptional cases, the Embassy may grant a 7-day Entry Visa (a  national D-visa) so that the foreign spouse can travel to Norway to submit the  application for Residence Permit, and wait in Norway while the case is being  processed. Similarly, a 7-day Entry Visa may be granted if an application for  Residence Permit already has been submitted. The Embassy processes the case,  but a rejection may be appealed to UDI Applications for 7-day entry visas  (D-visas) are to be registered on the Application Portal. Simply fill out the  same application form as for a Schengen Visa, pay the handling fee of 60 Euros  using a credit/ debit card, and book an appointment for when you would like to  submit your passport and supporting documents at the Norwegian Visa Application  Centre. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:7-Day Entry Visa –  Spouse]

## Please Note :
- Payment for Visa Fees are done on-line only at
https://www.udi.no/en (https://www.udi.no/en)
- All fees are  non-refundable.
- There is a Service fee of EUR26 (MYR130) levied per application over and above the visa fee.
Courier re-submission:
The applicant may request to have the passport returned from the embassy while the application is being processed. If the applicant later resubmits the passport for issuance of visa, VFS may request the applicant to pay EUR 23.40 (MYR 115) to cover the Resubmission Courier.
The Visa Application Centre offers the following additional services at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table:Visit Family,Boyfriend/Girlfriend Or Friend]
All charges except Visa Fees are to be paid at Visa Application Center by cash/card in Malaysian Ringgit (VFS service charge and other charges)

## Documents Required
Please click here  (https://www.norway.no/en/thailand/services-info/visitors-visa-res-permit/visitors-visa/#necessary-doc)for  detail information

## Photo Specifications

## Processing Time

Please click here (https://selfservice.udi.no/)
Sponsorship Form for Visits – Must be filled out by the sponsor please click here

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Visit Family,Boyfriend/Girlfriend Or Friend
visa_types.forms:
Please check the boxes in the check-list and sign to confirm which documents you have submitted
Application Form - The applicant can register the visa application online on the Application Portal.
Please click here (https://selfservice.udi.no/)
Sponsorship Form for Visits – Must be filled out by the sponsor please click here
Group Application
Group applications must indicate the same period of travel and itinerary. Visa applications for all applicants listed in group registration, must be submitted at VFS on the same date.
If one or more applicant is missing to show up in person at VFS, the following documents are required to submit instead:
A letter from the applicant stating that they wish to cancel their online visa application (which was registered as part of the group).
A request letter for a visa fee refunded.
The applicant who is missing to submit their application together with the group should provide the above two letters, together with the group. A new online application can be registered and be submitted as an individual visa application later.

Group Application
Group applications must indicate the same period of travel and itinerary. Visa applications for all applicants listed in group registration, must be submitted at VFS on the same date.
If one or more applicant is missing to show up in person at VFS, the following documents are required to submit instead:
A letter from the applicant stating that they wish to cancel their online visa application (which was registered as part of the group).

The applicant who is missing to submit their application together with the group should provide the above two letters, together with the group. A new online application can be registered and be submitted as an individual visa application later.

visa_types.name: Family Member of Eu National
visa_types.visa_fees: Family  members of EU/EEA nationals are exempt from the visa handling fee of 80 Euros.
visa_types.forms:
Please  check the boxes in the check-list and sign to confirm which documents you have  submitted
Application  Form - The applicant can register the visa application online on the  Application Portal.
 Please click here (https://selfservice.udi.no/)
Sponsorship Form for Visits – Must be filled out by the sponsor please click here
visa_types.overview:
Overview
The following information applies to spouses,  descendants (children) and dependent ascendants (parents) of EU/EEA nationals  who exercise their right of free movement within the EU/EEA area. Please note  that this visa category does not apply to family members of EU/EEA nationals  who reside in their home country or in countries outside of the EU/EEA region.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The following information applies to spouses,  descendants (children) and dependent ascendants (parents) of EU/EEA nationals  who exercise their right of free movement within the EU/EEA area. Please note  that this visa category does not apply to family members of EU/EEA nationals  who reside in their home country or in countries outside of the EU/EEA region.

## Visa Fees
Family  members of EU/EEA nationals are exempt from the visa handling fee of 80 Euros.

## Please Note :
- Payment for Visa Fees are done online only at
https://www.udi.no/en (https://www.udi.no/en)
- All fees are  non-refundable.
- There is a Service fee of EUR26 (MYR130) levied per application over and above the visa fee.
Courier re-submission:
The applicant may request to have the passport returned from the embassy while the application is being processed. If the applicant later resubmits the passport for issuance of visa, VFS may request the applicant to pay EUR 23.40 (MYR 115) to cover the Resubmission Courier.
The Visa Application Centre offers the following additional services at a nominal additional cost: 

[Table:Visit Family,Boyfriend/Girlfriend Or Friend]
All charges except Visa Fees are to be paid at Visa Application Center by cash/card in Malaysian Ringgit (VFS service charge and other charges)

Please click  here  (https://www.norway.no/en/thailand/services-info/visitors-visa-res-permit/visitors-visa/#necessary-doc)for detail information
